column1: # PAINT — per-sample coverage over the pigmentation panel (EXACT, from committed data)
# Computed 2026-07-23 from data/<sample>_depth.txt (samtools depth -a over the panel).
# CAVEATS (important):
#  1. These depths are measured at the panel's CURRENT (hg38) coordinates read against
#     hg19 data (bug A2) -> they are realized depths at MIS-LOCATED positions, NOT the
#     true coverage at the intended pigmentation SNPs. True per-locus coverage comes
#     after the build fix / rebuild (Stage 2/3, Q6).
#  2. Denisova3's value is ARTIFACTUALLY low (0.495x) due to the chr-naming bug (A1);
#     its true coverage is ~30x. It is a high-coverage Denisovan mis-recovered here.
#  3. "max" >> "mean" in low-coverage samples (e.g. vindija87 max 147, Sclad max 91)
#     is a bioinformatic pileup artifact (collapsed/repetitive regions) -> motivates
#     the max-depth cap in the rebuild's calling stage.
#  4. Published/expected genome-wide coverage per sample is to be recorded in the
#     provenance manifest (Q1) from the source papers and asserted against realized
#     coverage (Q6). Column expected_wg_cov is left "confirm" until then.
# sample        realized_mean_panel_depth  max_depth  covered_of_222  pct_covered  tier            expected_wg_cov
vindija33       30.716                     106        222/222         100.0        high            confirm(~30x Pruefer2017)
Chagyrskaya8    27.423                     85         222/222         100.0        high            confirm(~27x Mafessoni2020)
den25           16.680                     48         183/222         82.4         high/medium      confirm
den5            16.059                     36         222/222         100.0        high            confirm(Altai Neanderthal, Pruefer2014)
vindija87       3.185                      147        122/222         55.0         low(+maxdepth artifact)  confirm
lesCottes       2.941                      51         142/222         64.0         low             confirm
goyet           2.464                      54         163/222         73.4         low             confirm
mez2            1.856                      53         113/222         50.9         low             confirm
Sclad           1.856                      91         64/222          28.8         low(+maxdepth artifact)  confirm
denny           1.252                      20         121/222         54.5         low(Denisova11 hybrid)   confirm(~2.6x Slon2018)
spy             0.743                      22         75/222          33.8         low             confirm
Denisova3       0.495                      6          69/222          31.1         ARTIFACT(true ~30x, bug A1)  confirm(~30x Meyer2012)
mez1            0.180                      2          37/222          16.7         very low        confirm
hst             0.117                      2          24/222          10.8         very low        confirm
Sid1253         EMPTY                      -          0/0             -            no data (excluded -> 14 analyzed)  none
